_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.537), AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.509).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.460). Shared vocabulary: [system]. DCWF-only terms [configuration, maintain, monitor, server] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.887, R=0.837). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.1%). "Monitor and maintain system/server configuration." and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 > STS 0.460 (gap +0.094). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [system]. DCWF-only: [configuration, maintain, monitor, server]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.460 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
